metadata.name: App Insights - Slow requests
metadata.description: Find request operations with sustained slow duration over the selected lookback window.

queries.text: Request operations averaging over 5 seconds with more than 10 calls
queries.kql: requests | where timestamp > ago(24h) | where duration > 5s | summarize count(), avg(duration) by name | where count_ > 10 | extend compliant = false
